description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image as the default and defines a single production stage. Add a production job that runs in the ruby:latest image, only on the master branch, executes the commands apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y ruby-dev, gem install dpl, and dpl --provider=heroku --app=node-heroku-dpl --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY to deploy the app to Heroku, and is marked as a deploy type.
